rationale: Review 2 has the decisive reuse finding I could confirm in the diff: general lemmas such as `BialgHom.map_antipode` and tensor-product `map_id`/`map_comp` are private despite being useful beyond this file. Some of its duplicate-specialization comments are more debatable because base-change-specific API lemmas can be useful, but acting on the private-helper finding would make the PR meaningfully better for reuse.
